description: Read-cap measurement basis per surface. Closes FGAP-016 (P3): for --json measure the EMITTED compact form (so the cap reflects what actually ships), for text/Pi-tool keep measuring the pretty form (what the agent reads); surface the firing dimension (bytes vs lines) in the REFUSAL message. Cross-channel: the truncate.ts cap primitive + cli.ts boundedJsonOutput + read-element.ts structureForRead/renderReadText.
notes: Release-group: read-cap-measurement (R+2) | order 8 | addresses FGAP-016 | standalone P3, cross-channel
